fieldDescription: Preserves the first use of a vanilla-style portrait. Later duplicate uses can be replaced.
Leaves factions not listed in Dynamic Portraits' factionRoles map unchanged. Disabled by default so mod factions can participate unless blacklisted.
vanillaTopLevel counts portraits directly under graphics/portraits. allPortraits counts any eligible portrait path.
Fallback chance that an eligible duplicate is replaced when its role does not have a specific chance.

defaultValue: The recommended blacklist is built in. Add only extra faction IDs below. Separate IDs with commas or spaces.
Core defaults: uaf, uaf_november, uaf_mimic, uaf_automata, avali_explorer, hiver, fang.
Emergent Threats: asm_relic, diamond_nexus, vantage_group, vice_diktat_navy, vice_light_of_ludd, vice_lions_guard, vice_project_mayfly.
IX Revival: ix_battlegroup, ix_core, ix_marzanna, ix_trinity, ix_trinity_asm, ix_remnant_hvb, ix_comsec.

fieldDescription: Keeps known non-human or portrait-heavy mod factions protected. Turn this off only if you want to manage the blacklist yourself.
Extra faction IDs Dynamic Portraits should never alter. Example: some_faction, other_faction
